results.title: Senior Data Analyst, Finance and Credit (Remote) | Hirevector
highlights:
# Senior Data Analyst, Finance and Credit (Remote)
...
### About the job Senior Data Analyst, Finance and Credit (Remote)
...
The Data Analytics team plays the critical role of providing analytical support across Paychex's organization to enable data-driven decision making. We leverage our analytical and technical skills to help our partners with a multitude of services, some of which include understanding our underwriting models and presenting on trends in our loan performance, analyzing market size opportunities, creating financial models, developing our business intelligence pipeline to enable self-service reporting, and architecting/automating of work processes.
...
As the Senior Data Analyst - Finance and Credit at Paychex, you will be a critical member to lead fair valuation and financial automation initiatives by building repeatable, scalable, and auditable analytics and data-pipelines.
...
- Own end-to-end initiatives supporting the modeling, automation, and analytics in financial dashboards, fair value accounting and forecasting. These initiatives drove more accurate, more efficient, and more scalable financial close cycles and insight-driven business decisions
...
- Drive discussions on methodology enhancements, and data model development, and recommend solutions to new data and credit product changes, while improving accuracy of product metrics. This includes valuation methodology, data modeling, and architecture discussions, while influencing product roadmap. Work closely with engineering teams to ensure quick turnaround on fixes
...
- Partner with Accounting, Audit, Product, and Engineering teams to support monthly financial reporting and deliver an accurate, consistent, and efficient data reporting process
...
- Create reports and dashboards in BI tools such as Looker. Monitor trends in relevant metrics and report on key insights on a daily basis
...
- Work with various big data platforms (such as AWS, Redshift, BDT, etc..), data service providers and internal engineering teams to explore APIs, ingestions of new datasets/sources, and evaluation of business impacts
...
- BS/MS Degree in Business Analytics, Financial Engineering, Finance, Economics, Engineering or other highly quantitative/analytical field
...
- 3+ years of professional experience in SQL querying, and BI/reporting development with large and complex data set (Looker, Tableau, or Power BI)
...
- 2+ years of experience in financial analytics or quantitative modeling driving business decisions
...
- Experience in translating business requirements to Data Warehousing and ETL needs
...
- 5+ years experience in data analytics tools such as Python or R and using tools like Excel and Google Sheets
- Strong communication with client-facing and executive level data presentation skills
...
- Experience in cash flow valuation modeling of consumer lending products or asset backed securities, with ability to develop and manage financial models independently
...
- Knowledge of statistical methods and machine learning algorithms
...
- Previous consumer marketplace lending industry experience with focus on capital markets, finance, accounting, or

results.title: Ryan Ozzello
highlights:
Data Scientist at Paychex
...
Data Scientist at [Paychex](https://www.linkedin.com/company/paychex)
...
Data Science is in my blood. With almost 4 years of end-to-end project experiences helping to advance the data maturity of a large organization, I've become competent at all stages of the data science process from project ideation, data engineering, and predictive modeling, to project management strategies, business communication and team leadership. Ever since 3rd grade math class, crying to my parents, I've had an insatiable desire to not only memorize facts, but grow deep roots of understanding. Today, I'm pursuing the high bar of mastery, not only in data science techniques but also in business effectiveness. Key accomplishments: - Owned (designed, built, tested, deployed, and monitored) a real-time deal-specific discount recommendation system for over 1500 sales reps. (Python, XGBoost, JMeter, Azure Machine Learning Cloud) - Pioneered a completely new quoting data collection system with exploratory data analysis (EDA), data cleansing, and modeling pipeline development to boost company data maturity, modeling capabilities, and inform sales strategy decisions. (Alteryx, Python, Dask, big data) - Produced and presented VP level sales root cause analyses to guide actionable insights for policy making and project prioritization. - Evaluated usefulness and modeling potential of data products to inform data purchase agreements. - Formulated team practice improvements and standards such as version control (git, Bitbucket), documentation (Confluence), applying the Scrum methodology, and shared team Python libraries. - Inspired a happier and more effective team holding the Values Champion role to facilitate and lead team bonding and culture shaping activities/discussions. What excites me the most about data science is breaking the boundary of possible in the minds of our stakeholders, while collaborating closely in teams to make solving complex data problems look easy. Feel free to reach out and connect! Together we can advance human flourishing with the wonderfully exciting tools of data science and AI!
...

### SVP Data and Artificial Intelligence at [Paychex](https://www.linkedin.com/company/paychex) (Current)
...
Enterprise AI & Transformation Executive Lead enterprise AI strategy and transformation initiatives across one of the nation's largest SMB service organizations, focused on translating emerging AI capabilities into measurable business outcomes across sales, operations, customer experience, and workforce productivity. Key accomplishments:
...
- Developed one of the industry's earliest large-scale AI adoption programs, proving that sustainable business value is driven not by AI deployment, but by workflow integration, user experience, and behavioral adoption.
...
- Led development of next-generation agentic AI systems that transformed how employees access knowledge, execute workflows, and make decisions, accelerating organizational productivity and execution.
...
- Designed and deployed AI-powered operational platforms that automated complex business processes at enterprise scale, improving efficiency, consistency, and service delivery.
...
- Established advanced data and intelligence capabilities that expanded enterprise visibility into customer, operational, and market signals, enabling faster decision making and more effective AI-driven business solutions.
...
Built and led TD Ameritrade's enterprise AI, analytics, automation, and innovation capabilities, helping transform artificial intelligence from an emerging technology into a measurable driver of customer experience, operational efficiency, and shareholder value. Key accomplishments:
...
- Leveraged AI and natural language processing to uncover customer needs, operational friction, and growth opportunities, enabling marketing, product, service, and strategy teams to make decisions based on direct customer behavior rather than surveys or sampling.
...
- Built the operational framework required to move AI from experimentation into enterprise production, establishing repeatable capabilities for deployment, governance, adoption, and value realization.
...
- Directed teams responsible for artificial intelligence, advanced analytics, innovation, automation, and data science, generating tens of millions of dollars in measurable business value while helping establish long-term competitive advantage through AI and analytics. This experience shaped my belief that AI success is not primarily a technology challenge—it is an adoption, workflow, and organizational transformation challenge. The organizations that create lasting advantage are those that successfully integrate AI into how people work and make decisions.
...
Creating a new function to take AI and Machine Learning proofs of concept from the lab to the front office. Responsible for coordinating efforts across the enterprise and developing the operational structure to implement and support new AI platforms

...
The advanced Technology group comprised highly skilled Technology Professionals charged with developing the next generation of technology solutions to solve existing and future business challenges and drive competitive advantage through innovation. I created an innovative natural language processing platform, developed and delivered a highly innovative enterprise wide hackathon platform (as part of the innovation channel) and also oversaw the complex procedure for creation of key customer applications based on machine learning and AI. I also structured a series of winning ideas around idea implementation frameworks and funding models.

# Lead Scientist, Artificial Intelligence Research
...
Posted Jun 18, 2026
...
The Senior Engineer, AI is responsible for building AI and Machine learning models and pipelines, with a focus on generative AI, LLMs and predictive modelling. The successful candidate will work closely with data scientists and product leads to implement AI models, build required data and code pipelines through rigorous engineering disciplines You should have expertise in the design, development, management, and maintenance of systems and handling of large datasets. You should have hands on experience with common machine learning and AI frameworks, and a good knowledge of AI and machine learning fundamentals (deep learning, regression, classification and clustering algorithms), retrieval augmented generation pipelines, as well as a good grasp of the design and evaluation of LLM-supported use cases.
